Indian Institute of Science Bachelor of.official_note: Official IISc-published PDF 'Year-wise Cutoff for Bachelor of Science (Research) Programme' (2021-2025), JEE-Advanced category-rank cutoffs. URL resolves to the official iisc.ac.in domain (matches existing_data_source). Generic current_official_cutoff_url replaced with this specific cutoff document.

Indian Institute of Space Science and Te.official_note: Official IIST 'Undergraduate Admissions: Statistics' page showing opening/closing JEE-Advanced percentages and admission ranks by category (General/EWS/OBC/SC/ST) per programme for 2017-2025. More specific than the generic current_official_cutoff_url; verified loads with cutoff data.

Indian Institutes of Science Education a.official_note: Official IISER Joint Admissions Committee portal (iiseradmission.in) where round-wise IAT cutoffs / merit list / seat allotment are published. Actual cutoff and merit-list data are behind candidate login (no public static cutoff page); could not fetch directly (SSL handshake error on our side). Already has data via existing source.

Indira Gandhi National Tribal University.official_note: Official IGNTU 'Provisional Selection List - Second Open Counselling (UG/PG Admission 2025-26)' PDF on igntu.ac.in. Contains the selected-candidate merit list for B.A. (Tribal Studies-Art-Culture & Folk Literature) Honours, with category, admission mode (CUET / NON-CUET 12th-merit) and scores. Closing cutoffs below are derived as the lowest selected score per seat-quota; admission portal: https://igntuadm.samarth.edu.in/2025/.

Indira Kala Sangeet University Entrance.official_note: Official admission page of Rajkumari Indira Singh Kala Sangeet Vishwavidyalaya (IKSV), Khairagarh (iksv.ac.in). Publishes audition/aptitude 'Selected Students' merit lists (2025-26 List II/III) across Faculties of Music/Dance/Visual Arts/Arts. Admission is audition+interview based; merit lists are candidate-name lists with no college/branch/category opening-closing rank cutoff table to extract.

Institute of Hotel Management Catering T.official_note: Official NCHMCT e-counselling OR-CR (opening-closing rank) page on nchmcounselling.nic.in. NCHM JEE is the national entrance for IHM B.Sc Hospitality/Culinary programmes; institute-wise opening/closing ranks per round (2021-2026) are published here via the admissions.nic.in report links. Replaces the third-party shiksha.com current URL. Already has data.

Integrated Bachelor of Arts and Bachelor.official_note: Official NTA NCET portal (exams.nta.nic.in/ncet) - the National Common Entrance Test conducted by NTA on behalf of NCTE for the 4-year Integrated Teacher Education Programme (includes integrated BA B.Ed). NTA publishes scorecards/results here; college-wise cutoffs/merit lists are released by individual participating universities, so no single official cutoff table exists. Replaces the third-party shiksha.com current URL.
